text.title: QA Flake Ledger Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-flake-ledger-template.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: ledger_version not semver; entries with duplicate test_id; missing owner/root_cause/state; review_cadence_days>14.
